query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "longlive-2.0: an nvfp4 parallel infrastructure for long video generati" computer science
rationale: This paper addresses the same core domain (long video generation) and the specific challenge of maintaining consistency over long horizons, which is the central problem the user's proposed "LongLive-2.0" infrastructure aims to solve. It satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same mechanism (long-horizon consistency and narrative coherence) and providing the necessary empirical baseline and state-of-the-art comparison for any new infrastructure in this specific sub-field.
